era: 1982-1986. Proto-Grunge. E=8 -- heavy, dark, aggressive, before the name existed.
associated_musicians: Greg Gilmore (Mother Love Bone, Pearl Jam lineage S36-314)

theory_nodes.concept: Ten Minute Warning as grunge family tree oldest branch. Steve Turner -> Green River -> Mudhoney (S36-310). Greg Gilmore -> Mother Love Bone -> Pearl Jam lineage (S36-314). No other pre-grunge band seeds as many summit entries through direct personnel.
theory_nodes.description: The genealogical root of two grunge summit entries.

theory_nodes.concept: Proto-grunge at E=8: the sound was complete in 1982-1986 before the commercial infrastructure to support it existed. E=8 is retroactive sonic assessment, not commercial. The genre arrived; the market arrived four years later.
theory_nodes.description: E=8 as sonic truth vs. commercial obscurity.

theory_nodes.concept: The last high-energy pre-summit echo: E=8 in the post-summit sequence. E=7 plateau (317-322) broken at 323. After 324 (Swallow, E=7) the arc returns to the lower energy post-summit zone.
theory_nodes.description: E=8 local peak in post-summit: the retrospective echo of the summit's maximum.

cross_references.relationship: E=7 to E=8. E=7 plateau ends. Post-summit arc reaches back to 1982.
E=8 to E=7. The E=8 peak is local; the post-summit arc continues at E=7 with the 1989 founding-moment Sub Pop band.
Steve Turner summit connection. Ten Minute Warning (1982) -> Green River (1984) -> Mudhoney (1988). The guitar vocabulary is continuous.
Greg Gilmore summit connection. Ten Minute Warning -> Mother Love Bone -> Temple of the Dog -> Pearl Jam.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8 + E=8 = E=16. Both sustained pressure events. Proto-grunge at maximum sustained output; tidal bore at maximum hydraulic sustained output. The pressure pairing.

milestones: OLDEST BRANCH OF GRUNGE FAMILY TREE
